PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/siga-cociap/public/boleta-publica" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; $csrf = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'name="_csrf_token" value="\([^"]+\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; $b = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/siga-cociap/public/boleta-publica/consultar" -Method POST -Body @{ codigo = 'COCIAP-2026-B1-T3GZGB'; _csrf_token = $csrf } -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($b.StatusCode\)"; if \($b.Content -match 'Logro destacado \\\(\([^\)]+\)\\\)'\) { "LEYENDA AD: $\($Matches[1]\)" }; if \($b.Content -match 'Logro esperado \\\(\([^\)]+\)\\\)'\) { "LEYENDA A: $\($Matches[1]\)" })

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT bp.codigo_acceso, c.nota_numerica, n.codigo AS nivel FROM calificaciones c JOIN matriculas m ON m.id = c.matricula_id JOIN secciones s ON s.id = m.seccion_id JOIN grados g ON g.id = s.grado_id JOIN niveles n ON n.id = g.nivel_id JOIN boletas_publicas bp ON bp.matricula_id = m.id AND bp.periodo_id = 1 JOIN bloqueos_competencia bc ON bc.carga_id = c.carga_id AND bc.competencia_id = c.competencia_id AND bc.periodo_id = 1 WHERE c.nota_numerica = 17 AND c.periodo_id = 1 AND n.codigo = 'sec' AND bp.activa = 1 LIMIT 1;")
PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT matricula_id FROM boletas_publicas WHERE codigo_acceso = 'COCIAP-2026-B1-V55BRA';")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT ca.id AS carga_id, COALESCE\(ca.subarea_id, ca.area_id\) FROM cargas_academicas ca JOIN usuarios u ON u.id = ca.docente_id JOIN personas p ON p.id = u.persona_id WHERE p.dni = '12345678' AND ca.estado = 'activa' LIMIT 1; SELECT c.id AS comp_id, c.subarea_id, c.area_id FROM competencias c LIMIT 0;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT c.id AS comp_id FROM competencias c JOIN cargas_academicas ca ON \(ca.subarea_id = c.subarea_id OR ca.area_id = c.area_id\) WHERE ca.id = 8 LIMIT 1;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "UPDATE periodos SET limite_notas = '2026-06-11 23:59:00' WHERE id = 1;"; $base = "http://localhost/siga-cociap/public"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/login" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; $csrf = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'name="_csrf_token" value="\([^"]+\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; $null = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/login/procesar" -Method POST -Body @{ dni = '12345678'; password = 'admin1234'; _csrf_token = $csrf } -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/docente/criterios/crear" -Method POST -Body @{ _csrf_token = $csrf; carga_id = '8'; competencia_id = '45'; nombre = 'TEST CRITERIO FASE2'; descripcion = 'Descripcion de prueba del criterio' } -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -SkipHttpErrorCheck; "T2: $\($r2.StatusCode\) → $\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r2.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT c.id, c.nombre_corto, c.codigo_minedu, c.area_id, c.subarea_id, a.tipo, a.nombre, g_nivel.nombre AS nivel FROM competencias c JOIN areas a ON a.id = c.area_id LEFT JOIN niveles g_nivel ON g_nivel.id = a.nivel_id WHERE a.tipo = 'transversal' ORDER BY c.id;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM secciones; SHOW COLUMNS FROM cargas_academicas LIKE 'estado'; SHOW COLUMNS FROM competencias LIKE 'id'; SHOW COLUMNS FROM matriculas LIKE 'id'; SHOW COLUMNS FROM usuarios LIKE 'id';")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" -l app\\Models\\CalificacionModel.php && & "C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe" -l app\\Models\\TransversalModel.php; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/siga-cociap/public/boleta-publica" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; $csrf = \([regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'name="_csrf_token" value="\([^"]+\)"'\)\).Groups[1].Value; $b = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/siga-cociap/public/boleta-publica/consultar" -Method POST -Body @{ codigo_acceso = 'COCIAP-2026-B1-V55BRA'; _csrf_token = $csrf } -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing; $t = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($b.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\)\); "LEN: $\($t.Length\)"; if \($t -match 'Transversal'\) { "TRANSVERSALES PRESENTES: SI" } else { "TRANSVERSALES PRESENTES: NO" }; \([regex]::Matches\($t, '\(?s\)bd-area__name">\([^<]+\)<'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value.Trim\(\) }\) -join ' | ')

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT s.id, s.nombre, g.nombre_display, \(SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT bc.competencia_id\) FROM bloqueos_competencia bc JOIN cargas_academicas ca2 ON ca2.id = bc.carga_id JOIN areas a2 ON a2.id = ca2.area_id WHERE ca2.seccion_id = s.id AND a2.tipo='transversal' AND bc.periodo_id=1\) AS trans_bloqueadas FROM secciones s JOIN grados g ON g.id = s.grado_id WHERE s.id NOT IN \(SELECT seccion_id FROM cierres_transversales WHERE periodo_id=1\);")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root siga_cociap -e "SELECT ca.id AS carga, ca.seccion_id, COALESCE\(ca.subarea_id, ca.area_id\) AS sub_o_area, ca.subarea_id, ca.area_id FROM cargas_academicas ca WHERE ca.id = 8; SELECT comp.id FROM competencias comp JOIN cargas_academicas ca ON \(\(ca.subarea_id IS NOT NULL AND comp.subarea_id = ca.subarea_id\) OR \(ca.area_id IS NOT NULL AND ca.subarea_id IS NULL AND comp.area_id = ca.area_id\)\) WHERE ca.id = 8; SELECT competencia_id FROM bloqueos_competencia WHERE carga_id = 8 AND periodo_id = 1; SELECT s.id, s.tutor_id FROM secciones s WHERE s.id = \(SELECT seccion_id FROM cargas_academicas WHERE id = 8\); SELECT u.id, p.dni FROM usuarios u JOIN personas p ON p.id = u.persona_id WHERE p.dni = '12345678';")
